topic: Prepositions Part 2 — Direction & Movement (To, From, Into, Onto, Through, Across, Along)

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I am going home from the office.
The water was poured into the bottle.

exercises.hindiScript: वह पुल के उस पार गई।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The cat went into the room.

exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The children climbed onto the bus.
The air is coming through the window.

options: I am going from Mumbai to Delhi.

exercises.hindiScript: हम मैदान के उस पार गए।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: The water was poured into the bottle.

dictationPassage.text: We came through the tunnel. She went across the bridge. We walked along the beach. I am going from Mumbai to Delhi. The water was poured into the bottle.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: हम टनल से निकले। वह पुल के उस पार गई। हम समुद्र किनारे चले। मैं मुंबई से दिल्ली जा रहा हूँ। पानी बोतल में डाला।
